texts.orig: For 3+ nights stay one day visit to Lewa Conservancy is included

texts.orig: Lodge Exclusions: Conservation fees, transfers, Beading workshop, beauty treatments and all alcoholic drinks.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For 3+ nights stay, a visit to Ngarendare Forest Trust can be conducted on request at an extra fee of $70 per person per drive.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Camping can be supported on request with staff and security in Il Ngwesi and Ngare Ndare Forest. Camping and conservation fees apply. Camping equipmentcanbe provided.

table_cells.text: 7 nights self-catered self- drive. Max 20 people
Lodge Inclusions: Lodge staff including room attendant, waiter, chef. All linen and towels, laundry service

Lodge Exclusions: Conservation fees, Beading workshop, beauty treatments, game drives (extra US$30 per person per drive). For 3+ nights one day visit to Ngarendare Forest Trust at an extra fee of $70 per person per drive.
